name: Broccoli-Cauliflower Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces spaghetti, broken into thirds, cooked as directed
1 16-oz package frozen broccoli, cauliflower and carrots, cooked as directed
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 400°F.
Drain cooked spaghetti and rinse with hot water; set aside, keeping warm.
Drain cooked vegetables; set aside.
Spray a 9 x 13-inch pan.
In a medium saucepan, melt butter or margarine; stir in flour until smooth. Gradually add milk; blend well. Cook over medium heat for 6-10 minutes or until the mixture thickens and boils, stirring constantly. Stir in bullion, thyme, 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, and pepper.
Spoon cooked spaghetti into prepared baking dish. Top with cooked vegetables and mushrooms. Pour milk mixture over vegetables; sprinkle with 2 tablespoons Parmesan. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the mixture is thoroughly heated and bubbling around the edges.
